extract: Sneasler (Japanese: オオニューラ Ohnyula) is a dual-type Fighting/Poison Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It evolves from Hisuian Sneasel when leveled up while holding a Razor Claw during the day. Its Sinnohan counterpart is Weavile. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
